action.description:
Introduced by Senators Ratcliff, L. Johnson, Keyeski, Roys, Hesselbein, Larson and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives McCarville, Brown, DeSanto, Subeck, Sinicki, Ortiz-Velez, Hysell, Andraca, Roe, Miresse, Joers, Taylor, Kirsch, Udell, Hong, Bare, Anderson, Tenorio and Snodgrass
